name: Axis Bank Select Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Retail shopping spends (up to Rs 20,000 spend/month)
rewards.displayRate: 20 EDGE REWARD Points / Rs 200 spent on retail shopping

exclusions: Cash advances and financial institution transactions
milestoneBenefits: 5,000 EDGE REWARD Points on spending Rs 3 lakh in a card anniversary year
Complete annual fee waiver on spending Rs 8 lakh in a card anniversary year
Priority Pass membership renewal on annual spends of Rs 3 lakh
Additional 6 complimentary golf rounds after spends of Rs 3 lakh in the same anniversary year
additionalBenefits: 10,000 EDGE REWARD Points worth Rs 2,000 on first card transaction within 30 days, not applicable for lifetime-free or Burgundy account holders
Buy one get one movie ticket offer on District app, capped at Rs 250 twice per month
Flat Rs 500 off once per month on BigBasket on minimum purchase of Rs 2,500
Flat Rs 200 off on Swiggy twice per month on minimum order value of Rs 1,000
Up to 12 complimentary international airport lounge visits through Priority Pass
2 complimentary domestic lounge visits per quarter on spends of Rs 50,000 in the last 3 months
1% fuel surcharge refund on fuel transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 400 per statement cycle
Complimentary for Burgundy customers while Burgundy status is maintained

salaried: Minimum Net Monthly Salary: Rs 50,000 (Rs 6,00,000 per annum)
